title: Kona
overview: Kolluru hasn't performed its yearly Kona (buffalo) sacrifice, leaving the village uneasy. Narayana, with his robot Jogi, is drawn into the village. As the ritual nears, secrets surface - will he dare to face the truth behind the sacrifice?
